commands_run: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/earth-witness-question.fk form-stdlib/tessera-external-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/tessera-external-witness-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/earth-witness-question.fk form-stdlib/tessera-external-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/tessera-external-witness-band.fk
failure_reason: Added Tessera as a compact external witness. The live probe reads the public v1.1/cambridge manifest and sample tile through anonymous S3, hashes the first 4096 returned embedding bytes, and emits a JSON witness. The Form proof returns 67108863 from source and binary artifacts, preserving source, manifest, tile, range hash, what/where/when/who/how/why answers, and trace-preserving CHOICE-RECEIPT signatures.
